login.title: Sign in to OWEG Admin
login.hint: Use your admin credentials to access the dashboard

resetPassword.hint: Enter your admin email and we will send reset instructions.
resetPassword.successfulRequest: If an account exists for that email, reset instructions are on the way.
resetPassword.newPasswordHint: Choose a new password for your OWEG Admin account.
resetPassword.successfulReset: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidLinkHint: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
